name: langwatch-experts
description: scenario-expert and langwatch-expert delegate-to agents, backed by the LangWatch MCP server (docs tools work with no API key; set the optional key to unlock traces/observability).

langwatch_api_key.title: LangWatch API key (optional)
langwatch_api_key.description: Optional. Leave blank to use documentation tools only (zero-config). Set it to unlock live observability and platform tools: search_traces, get_trace, get_analytics, and the platform_* scenario/suite/run tools. Get a key at https://app.langwatch.ai.

langwatch_endpoint.title: LangWatch endpoint (optional)
langwatch_endpoint.description: Optional self-hosted/region override. Defaults to https://app.langwatch.ai when blank.
